---
title: Brand 3
engine: jupyter
brand:
  color:
    palette:
      forest-green: "#2d5f3e"
      sage-mist: "#7a9e7e"
      moss-stone: "#4a6b50"
      bark-brown: "#5c4a3a"
      fern-leaf: "#3d8b5e"
    background:
      dark: "#141e17"
      light: "#f4f8f5"
    foreground:
      dark: "#8cc49e"
      light: "#3a5c44"
    dark:
      dark: "#141e17"
      light: "#3a5c44"
    light:
      dark: "#8cc49e"
      light: "#f4f8f5"
  typography:
    fonts:
      - family: Merriweather
        source: bunny
      - family: Source Sans 3
        source: bunny
      - family: Source Code Pro
        source: bunny
    base: Source Sans 3
    headings: Merriweather
    monospace: Source Code Pro
---

{{< include /brands/_python.qmd >}}
